basic_details.job_title: NFSU Gandhinagar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NFSU Gandhinagar is recruiting 1 Project Assistant post with M.Sc./M.A. qualification, last date 29 June 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions before applying.

important_instructions: This is a purely temporary position and commensurate with the project. No invitation emails will be sent for appearing in the interview. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. The interview will be held in hybrid mode at ICHF, NFSU, Gandhinagar. Candidates are advised to read the official advertisement carefully before applying.

_labels.notification_pdf: NFSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Official Notification

all_official_links.label: NFSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Official Notification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NFSU Gandhinagar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the NFSU Gandhinagar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 is 29 June 2026. Interested candidates should complete the registration and submit the application before the deadline. Late or incomplete applications may not be accepted by the university.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced under NFSU Gandhinagar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU) Gandhinagar has announced 1 vacancy for the post of Project Assistant. Since only one position is available, eligible candidates are advised to apply as early as possible. The recruitment will be conducted as per the eligibility criteria mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for NFSU Gandhinagar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Project Assistant post must possess an M.A. or M.Sc. degree from a recognized university or institution. Applicants should ensure that they meet the educational qualification requirement before submitting the online application. Higher qualifications or relevant research experience may be advantageous if specified by the recruiting authority.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NFSU Gandhinagar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification has not specified any minimum or maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post. However, candidates should refer to the detailed notification for any updates regarding age criteria or relaxation. If applicable, age relaxation will be provided according to Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for NFSU Gandhinagar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a written examination or online test, followed by a skill test (if applicable), document verification, and medical examination. Candidates must successfully qualify each stage to be considered for final selection. The exact recruitment process will be carried out as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the NFSU Gandhinagar Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Assistant post will be as per the norms of National Forensic Sciences University. The official notification should be referred to for detailed information regarding the pay scale, allowances, and other benefits. Selected candidates will receive remuneration according to the applicable project or university guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for NFSU Gandhinagar Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need to visit the official NFSU website, locate the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification, and complete the online application process. Applicants should carefully fill in all required details, upload the necessary documents, and submit the form before the last date. It is recommended to keep a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
